instruction: Help me organize the company milestones into the company profile

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Company Milestones
2018: Company founded, angel round funding 5M CNY
2019: Launched first SaaS product, 50 clients
2020: Series A funding 30M CNY, 100+ employees
2021: Annual revenue exceeded 100M CNY
2022: Overseas expansion, entered 3 Southeast Asian countries
2023: Series B funding 120M CNY, valuation 1B CNY
2024: Global client count exceeded 1000
2025: IPO preparation underway' > /home/user/Desktop/company_milestone.txt

phases.instruction: Help me organize the company milestones into the company profile

Extract the latest funding information from /home/user/Desktop/company_milestone.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/company_profile.txt: '2023 Series B funding 120M CNY, valuation 1B CNY, preparing for IPO in 2025', save
